requirement_topic.en: Electromagnetic Compatibility — Household Refrigerating Appliances (CISPR 14 series via GEOSTM / EU DCFTA approximation)
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容——家用制冷器具（CISPR 14系列，经GEOSTM／欧盟DCFTA趋同）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容——家用製冷器具（CISPR 14系列，經GEOSTM／歐盟DCFTA趨同）

summary.en: Household refrigerating appliances placed on the Georgian market are subject to electromagnetic compatibility requirements based on the CISPR 14 / IEC EMC framework — the emission product-family standard CISPR 14-1 (as adopted in the EU as EN 55014-1) and the immunity standard CISPR 14-2 (EN 55014-2). Under the EU-Georgia DCFTA, Georgia is approximating the EU EMC regulatory model, with national conformity assessment and market surveillance through GEOSTM. These standards cover conducted and radiated disturbance limits and immunity for household appliances, including the switching electronics of modern inverter-driven compressors. The conformity model under EU approximation is manufacturer self-declaration supported by a technical file; harmonic-current and flicker limits (IEC 61000-3-2 / 61000-3-3 family) apply as supplementary requirements where relevant. Because Georgia's grid is 220/380 V 50 Hz — matching China — the supply-related EMC test conditions correspond to the Chinese configuration.
summary.zh: 投放格鲁吉亚市场的家用制冷器具须符合以CISPR 14／IEC电磁兼容框架为基础的要求——发射产品族标准CISPR 14-1（在欧盟采纳为EN 55014-1）及抗扰度标准CISPR 14-2（EN 55014-2）。在欧盟—格鲁吉亚DCFTA框架下，格鲁吉亚正向欧盟电磁兼容监管模式趋同，国家合格评定与市场监管由GEOSTM管理。上述标准涵盖家用器具的传导与辐射骚扰限值及抗扰度，包括现代变频压缩机的开关电子设备。欧盟趋同下的合格评定模式为制造商自我声明并以技术文件为支撑；谐波电流与闪烁限值（IEC 61000-3-2／61000-3-3族）在相关情形下作为补充要求适用。由于格鲁吉亚电网为220/380 V 50 Hz——与中国一致——与供电相关的电磁兼容测试条件与中国配置对应。
summary.zht: 投放喬治亞市場的家用製冷器具須符合以CISPR 14／IEC電磁相容框架為基礎的要求——發射產品族標準CISPR 14-1（在歐盟採納為EN 55014-1）及抗擾度標準CISPR 14-2（EN 55014-2）。在歐盟—喬治亞DCFTA框架下，喬治亞正向歐盟電磁相容監管模式趨同，國家合格評定與市場監管由GEOSTM管理。上述標準涵蓋家用器具的傳導與輻射騷擾限值及抗擾度，包括現代變頻壓縮機的開關電子設備。歐盟趨同下的合格評定模式為製造商自我聲明並以技術文件為支撐；諧波電流與閃爍限值（IEC 61000-3-2／61000-3-3族）在相關情形下作為補充要求適用。由於喬治亞電網為220/380 V 50 Hz——與中國一致——與供電相關的電磁相容測試條件與中國配置對應。

standards_or_laws: CISPR 14-1 (EN 55014-1) — Electromagnetic compatibility — Requirements for household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission (adopted via GEOSTM / EU approximation)
CISPR 14-2 (EN 55014-2) — Part 2: Immunity — product family standard
IEC 61000-3-2 / IEC 61000-3-3 — harmonic current emission, voltage fluctuation and flicker limits (supplementary where applicable)
EU-Georgia Association Agreement / DCFTA — EMC regulatory approximation framework administered through GEOSTM

summary.en: China's EMC requirements for household appliances are primarily governed by GB 4343.1-2018 (Electromagnetic disturbance characteristics — Part 1: Emission limits and measurement methods; mandatory, equivalent to CISPR 14-1:2016) and GB/T 4343.2-2020 (Part 2: Immunity; recommended, equivalent to CISPR 14-2:2015), with GB 17625.1-2022 (harmonic current emissions; mandatory, IDT IEC 61000-3-2:2020) where applicable. These are enforced under the CCC regime administered by SAMR/CNCA. Because both China's GB 4343 series and Georgia's adopted CISPR 14 standards share the same CISPR/IEC parent documents, the technical limits are closely aligned.
summary.zh: 中国家用器具的电磁兼容要求主要由GB 4343.1-2018（电磁骚扰特性——第1部分：发射限值和测量方法；强制性，等同CISPR 14-1:2016）和GB/T 4343.2-2020（第2部分：抗扰度；推荐性，等同CISPR 14-2:2015）管控，并在适用时适用GB 17625.1-2022（谐波电流发射；强制性，等同IEC 61000-3-2:2020）。上述标准在由SAMR／CNCA管理的CCC制度下执行。由于中国GB 4343系列与格鲁吉亚采纳的CISPR 14标准同源于相同的CISPR／IEC母文件，其技术限值高度一致。
summary.zht: 中國家用器具的電磁相容要求主要由GB 4343.1-2018（電磁騷擾特性——第1部分：發射限值和測量方法；強制性，等同CISPR 14-1:2016）和GB/T 4343.2-2020（第2部分：抗擾度；推薦性，等同CISPR 14-2:2015）管控，並在適用時適用GB 17625.1-2022（諧波電流發射；強制性，等同IEC 61000-3-2:2020）。上述標準在由SAMR／CNCA管理的CCC制度下執行。由於中國GB 4343系列與喬治亞採納的CISPR 14標準同源於相同的CISPR／IEC母文件，其技術限值高度一致。

standards_or_laws: GB 4343.1-2018 — Electromagnetic disturbance characteristics — Part 1: Emission (mandatory; equivalent to CISPR 14-1:2016; enforced under CCC by SAMR/CNCA)
GB/T 4343.2-2020 — Part 2: Immunity (recommended; equivalent to CISPR 14-2:2015)
GB 17625.1-2022 — Limits for harmonic current emissions (mandatory; IDT IEC 61000-3-2:2020)

gap.en: The technical limits are closely aligned because both systems derive from CISPR 14 / IEC, so the substantive engineering gap is small for most refrigerator models. The remaining gaps are procedural: (1) Chinese CNAS-accredited CCC EMC test reports (GB 4343.1) are not automatically accepted by GEOSTM-recognised conformity routes; a CISPR 14-based test report from an EU-accredited or ILAC MRA-accepted laboratory, or re-issuance, is typically needed to support a conformity declaration. (2) Inverter-compressor models should be checked against the current CISPR 14-1 edition adopted in Georgia, since newer editions add emission test configurations for switched-mode drives that older GB 4343.1 test data may not fully cover. Manufacturers should confirm which CISPR 14-1 edition GEOSTM currently references.
gap.zh: 由于两套制度均源自CISPR 14／IEC，技术限值高度一致，因此大多数电冰箱型号的实质性工程差距很小。剩余差距属程序层面：（1）中国CNAS认可的CCC电磁兼容检测报告（GB 4343.1）不被GEOSTM认可的合格评定路径自动接受；通常须提供由EU认可或ILAC MRA接受实验室出具的基于CISPR 14的检测报告，或重新出具，以支撑合格声明。（2）变频压缩机型号应对照格鲁吉亚现行采纳的CISPR 14-1版本核查，因新版增加了针对开关电源驱动的发射测试配置，旧版GB 4343.1检测数据可能未充分涵盖。制造商应确认GEOSTM现行引用的CISPR 14-1版本。
gap.zht: 由於兩套制度均源自CISPR 14／IEC，技術限值高度一致，因此大多數電冰箱型號的實質性工程差距很小。剩餘差距屬程序層面：（1）中國CNAS認可的CCC電磁相容檢測報告（GB 4343.1）不被GEOSTM認可的合格評定路徑自動接受；通常須提供由EU認可或ILAC MRA接受實驗室出具的基於CISPR 14的檢測報告，或重新出具，以支撐合格聲明。（2）變頻壓縮機型號應對照喬治亞現行採納的CISPR 14-1版本核查，因新版增加了針對開關電源驅動的發射測試配置，舊版GB 4343.1檢測數據可能未充分涵蓋。製造商應確認GEOSTM現行引用的CISPR 14-1版本。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EMC conformity based on the CISPR 14 series is required for market placement in Georgia via GEOSTM-recognised conformity routes under the EU DCFTA approximation framework
mandatory_status.cn: GB 4343.1-2018 is mandatory (GB) for CCC certification; GB/T 4343.2-2020 is recommended (GB/T); both enforced under CCC by SAMR/CNCA

source.publisher: GEOSTM — Georgian National Agency for Standards and Metrology

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EMC for household refrigerators in Georgia follows the CISPR 14 series adopted via GEOSTM / EU approximation — the same parent standards as China's GB 4343 series — so the technical limits are closely aligned. The gap is procedural: Chinese CCC EMC reports are not auto-accepted; a CISPR 14-based report from an EU-accredited or ILAC MRA laboratory (or re-issuance) is typically required. Verify the CISPR 14-1 edition GEOSTM references, especially for inverter-compressor models.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 格鲁吉亚家用电冰箱的电磁兼容遵循经GEOSTM／欧盟趋同采纳的CISPR 14系列——与中国GB 4343系列同源——故技术限值高度一致。差距属程序性：中国CCC电磁兼容报告不被自动接受；通常须提供由EU认可或ILAC MRA实验室出具的基于CISPR 14的报告（或重新出具）。请核实GEOSTM引用的CISPR 14-1版本，变频压缩机型号尤须注意。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 喬治亞家用電冰箱的電磁相容遵循經GEOSTM／歐盟趨同採納的CISPR 14系列——與中國GB 4343系列同源——故技術限值高度一致。差距屬程序性：中國CCC電磁相容報告不被自動接受；通常須提供由EU認可或ILAC MRA實驗室出具的基於CISPR 14的報告（或重新出具）。請核實GEOSTM引用的CISPR 14-1版本，變頻壓縮機型號尤須注意。
